name: Galaxy Digital Inc.
summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is a global financial services and infrastructure company focused on digital assets and high-performance computing (HPC). It operates two segments: Digital Assets (OTC trading, derivatives, lending, structured products, M&A advisory, ETFs, alternatives, staking, tokenization, custody) and Data Centers (HPC/AI infrastructure). Galaxy serves over 1,600 trading counterparties with approximately $12.3 billion in assets on its platform and is developing the Helios HPC data center campus in West Texas.

products.name: Global Markets
products.description: OTC spot and derivatives trading, lending, structured products, M&A advisory, equity and debt capital markets services.

products.name: Asset Management
products.description: Manages ETF and Alternatives strategies for institutional allocators and individuals.

products.name: Infrastructure Solutions
products.description: Staking, tokenization, and custodial technology enabling clients to participate in on-chain and decentralized ecosystems.

products.name: GalaxyOne
products.description: Retail fintech platform offering FDIC-insured high-yield deposit account, debt security, commission-free equities, and crypto trading.

products.name: Helios Data Center Campus
products.description: HPC/AI data center campus in West Texas with over 1.6 GW of ERCOT-approved gross power capacity.

partnerships.description: Lease agreements for 133 MW initial critical IT load plus incremental 393 MW at Helios campus.
Bank partner providing FDIC-insured high-yield demand deposit account for GalaxyOne U.S.-based depositors.
Regulated partner enabling commission-free U.S. equities trading on the GalaxyOne platform.
Regulated partner enabling crypto trading on the GalaxyOne platform.
